About this item

  • Flameless Bliss, Pet & Kid Friendly: Reclaim the joy of scents without the worry. Our electric candle warmer lamp eliminates soot and smoke. It’s a worry-free alternative for rental apartments, dorms, or homes with curious pets and toddlers. Our top-down technology melts wax evenly, preventing messy "tunneling" and doubling candle life. Enjoy pure fragrance with total peace of mind.
  • Safe & Serene, Auto Shut-Off Timer: Reclaim a clean home fragrance experience without open flames or soot. Features a programmable 2/4/8H timer with auto shut-off, making it a bedroom essential for naps or overnight use. Ideal for pet-friendly homes or housewarming gifts. Enjoy a flameless glow that complements your space and loved ones.
  • Smart Customization, Adjustable Height: Master your home ambiance with the Marycele electric candle warmer lamp. Featuring an adjustable height (3"-7"), it perfectly fits everything from small wax melts to large 22oz jar candles and 3-wick candles. The 0-100% stepless dimmer allows you to customize scent intensity for bedrooms or open living spaces.
  • Aesthetic Vintage Home Decor: Both functional and stylish, making a harmonious blend of a wooden base, gold metal body, and glass shade. This aesthetic lamp adds sophistication to any room - bedroom, living room, or office. Perfect for modern farmhouse decor and seasonal celebrations like Thanksgiving or Christmas.
  • Ultimate Valentines Day Gifts (2 Bulbs Included): Surprise her with this aesthetic candle lamp warmer, the perfect Valentine's Day gifts for women, mom, or girlfriend. Ideal as a housewarming gift, birthday, or Mother's Day present. Fits large jar candles and serves as romantic Valentines Day decor. Includes 2 Bulbs and a 365-day warranty for gifting.

About this Item

  • Flameless Bliss, Pet & Kid Friendly: Reclaim the joy of scents without the worry. Our electric candle warmer lamp eliminates soot and smoke. It’s a worry-free alternative for rental apartments, dorms, or homes with curious pets and toddlers. Our top-down technology melts wax evenly, preventing messy "tunneling" and doubling candle life. Enjoy pure fragrance with total peace of mind.
  • Safe & Serene, Auto Shut-Off Timer: Reclaim a clean home fragrance experience without open flames or soot. Features a programmable 2/4/8H timer with auto shut-off, making it a bedroom essential for naps or overnight use. Ideal for pet-friendly homes or housewarming gifts. Enjoy a flameless glow that complements your space and loved ones.
  • Smart Customization, Adjustable Height: Master your home ambiance with the Marycele electric candle warmer lamp. Featuring an adjustable height (3"-7"), it perfectly fits everything from small wax melts to large 22oz jar candles and 3-wick candles. The 0-100% stepless dimmer allows you to customize scent intensity for bedrooms or open living spaces.
  • Aesthetic Vintage Home Decor: Both functional and stylish, making a harmonious blend of a wooden base, gold metal body, and glass shade. This aesthetic lamp adds sophistication to any room - bedroom, living room, or office. Perfect for modern farmhouse decor and seasonal celebrations like Thanksgiving or Christmas.
  • Ultimate Valentines Day Gifts (2 Bulbs Included): Surprise her with this aesthetic candle lamp warmer, the perfect Valentine's Day gifts for women, mom, or girlfriend. Ideal as a housewarming gift, birthday, or Mother's Day present. Fits large jar candles and serves as romantic Valentines Day decor. Includes 2 Bulbs and a 365-day warranty for gifting.

Product Description

For quick and efficient distribution of scent, the electric candle warmer melts the candle and wax from the top down. The melting speed can be changed using the dimmer control of the candle warmer lamp and lowers the risk of fire by eliminating open flames, smoke, soot, and pollution. The scented wax melt warmer is a delicate yet useful ornament that may be used in workplaces, study spaces, living rooms, bedrooms, yoga studios, and more. It works with a range of jar candles and wax types. These candle lights are suitable birthday presents for moms and ladies owing to their elegant appearance and useful functionality. It is an ideal present for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Easter, Father's Day, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, and decor at home. If you have any issues with the products, please get in touch with us at any time. Package included: 1 x Marycele candle warmer lamp
